# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: https
    port: 443
    targetPort: 443
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: grpc
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: tcp
    port: 22
    targetPort: 22
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: udp
    port: 53
    targetPort: 53
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: dns-tcp
    port: 53
    targetPort: 53
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: dns-udp
    port: 53
    targetPort: 53
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: ssh
    port: 22
    targetPort: 22
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: smtp
    port: 25
    targetPort: 25
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: imap
    port: 143
    targetPort: 143
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: pop3
    port: 110
    targetPort: 110
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: imaps
    port: 993
    targetPort: 993
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: pop3s
    port: 995
    targetPort: 995
---

  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: ssh
    port: 22
    targetPort: 22
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: smtp
    port: 25
    targetPort: 25
---

kind: Service
metadata:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - name: imap
    port: 143
    targetPort: 143
---
